Native to the [[Bothawui/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] and found on many of their colonies, including [[Mandell]] and [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], the '''Radarks''' were subterrenean serpents that burrowed and tunnel underneath many Bothan structures. When these underground pathways and holes became plentiful, foundations of great institutions usually collapsed. Because of this the Radarks were considered the Bothans' most hated pest.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-06-10 -->''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]''
